form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months won by a neck at this track 0 - 56 March 28 over 1208m in soft going defeating Queue Jumper carrying 60kg at $21. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Darwin 3yo SW on July 5 over 1600m, 8 len behind Vanguard Legend carrying 58kg at $41. Strong winner here fresh on new home track and can measure up again.
